channel.title: Event-Driven-Architecture on cron.umbe.me
channel.description: Recent content in Event-Driven-Architecture on cron.umbe.me

item.title: Event-Driven Architecture in Pimcore: CQRS & Event Sourcing
item.description: Learn how to implement Event-Driven Architecture in Pimcore using CQRS and Event Sourcing patterns for handling millions of DataObjects. Battle-tested patterns from production systems achieving sub-second API response times with 50M+ records.
